title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: **Findings (minimality only)** - `Low`: `assistant` is now unused in `_derive_project_os_fields` and can be removed to reduce noise. [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L264) - `Low`: ticket parsing has broadened (`yaml-like` + markdown heading section + JSON) but tests only exercise yaml-like markdown. If you want stricter minimality, either remove the markdown-heading fallback or add focused tests for it. [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L185) [test_task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/tests/test_task_backup.py#L182) - `Low`: unused `sys` import in the test stub can be dropped. [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L24) **削るべきでないもの** - `kernel* source` の bound 強制 + fail-closed（`ticket_id`, `acceptance`, `authority_scope`） [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L273) - `manual-note` など非Kernel source を `artifact_only_unbound` で通す分岐（過剰拘束回避） [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L278) - Workflow 側の v2 envelope 検証（mirror に流す前の境界保証） [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L79) 高/中 severity の「余計な機能混入」は見当たりません。単一レーンへの後退を許す変更もこの範囲では確認していません。
